prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年吉林省理科（物理类）最低位次分别约为13211名→12680名→19992名→17416名→19267名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2023年曾大幅下滑至约19992名，2024 年短暂回升至17416名后，2025年再度后移至19267名，近两年累计后移约1851名，2025年基准位次约19267名；该校在吉林省理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2025 年均为40人，2026年招生计划仍为40人，连续六年计划持平，无扩招或缩招，供需弹性中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 广西大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学 排名从2021年第94位稳步上升至2026年第86位，近年排名持续提升，学校综合实力与认可度有所增强；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音 学校热度排名第25位（较热），综合热度约183万，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，对报考关注度有一定正向拉动；第五轮学科评估中广西大学无A-及以上等级学 科，顶尖学科竞争力相对有限，对高分段考生吸引力一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在吉林省招生的电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、集成电路设计与集成系统（电子信息 类，高热推荐）、机械设计制造及其自动化等专业社会热度较高；吉林省2026年普通高考总人数约110868人，按近年物理类占比约72.1%估算，物理类考生约79936人，较2025年物 理类80421人略有减少（约-0.6%），竞争压力小幅缓解；2026年；广西大学位于广西南宁市，距吉林省较远，属于跨省就读；该校 在吉林省招生计划稳定（40人），无显著地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、学校软科排名稳步上升及抖音热度中等偏高等因素 ，预计2026年报考热度略有升温，竞争小幅加剧；在2025年基准位次19267名基础上，预测最低位次约19317名，区间18817–19817名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间18817–19817名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于区间下限（18817名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化、集成电路设计 与集成系统等热门专业；位次在区间中后段建议优先考虑数学与应用数学、机械设计制造及其自动化等中等难度专业；位次接近区间上限（19817名附近）应以土木工程、智能建 造等三档专业稳妥保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Jilin Province Science (Physics Category) were approximately 13211 → 12680 → 19992 → 17416 → 19267, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2023, there was a significant drop to about 19992, followed by a brief recovery to 17416 in 2024, then a further backward shift to 19267 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1851 in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 19267. The enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province Science (Physics Category) was 40 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 enrollment plan remains 40 students, with the plan unchanged for six consecutive years, indicating neutral supply-demand elasticity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guangxi University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has steadily risen from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In recent years, its reputation has been stable, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. On Douyin, the university's popularity ranking is 25th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million, indicating moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, which has a certain positive pull on application interest. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Guangxi University has no disciplines rated A- or above, so its top-tier discipline competitiveness is relatively limited, attracting less interest from high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The majors offered by this university in Jilin Province, such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems (Electronic Information category, highly recommended), and Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, have high social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jilin Province general college entrance examination is approximately 110,868. Based on the recent proportion of Physics Category candidates at about 72.1%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 79,936, a slight decrease of about -0.6% compared to 80,421 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition pressure. In 2026, Guangxi University is located in Nanning City, Guangxi, which is far from Jilin Province, making it an inter-provincial study option. The enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province is stable (40 students), with no significant regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the steady rise in Soft Science rankings, and the moderate to high Douyin popularity, it is expected that the application heat in 2026 will slightly increase, with competition intensifying slightly. On the basis of the 2025 baseline ranking of 19267, the predicted lowest ranking is approximately 19317, with a range of 18817 to 19817.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Automation
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering
- Intelligent Construction.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 18817 to 19817, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (within 18817) can focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems. Candidates with rankings in the middle to back part of the range should prioritize moderately difficult majors like Mathematics and Applied Mathematics and Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 19817) should safely fall back on Tier 3 majors such as Civil Engineering and Intelligent Construction.
